---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
Clear description of the feature or improvement.

## Problem It Solves
What problem does this solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed Solution
How should this feature work? Provide examples if possible.

## Alternatives
Are there alternative solutions you've considered?

## Additional Context
Any other context, diagrams, mockups, or references?

## Would You Like to Implement This?
- [ ] I'm willing to submit a PR for this
- [ ] I'd like to discuss this first
- [ ] This is just a suggestion
